description_long: This object is a compact submachine gun with a sleek, matte black finish and an integrally suppressed barrel extending from the main body. The receiver features a series of linear engravings and a prominent magazine well, which holds a curved box magazine. The grip is ergonomically shaped and textured for secure handling, while the trigger guard is robust and slightly oversized. The stock is a fixed, polymer design with a ribbed buttplate for shoulder support. Iron sights are present, with a simple rear notch and a front post, both mounted along the top rail. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a modern, tactical appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black submachine gun with an integrally suppressed barrel, curved box magazine, fixed polymer stock, and simple iron sights.
description_view_0: The machine gun is viewed directly from the front, showing the circular opening of the suppressor and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_1: A full left-side profile reveals the integrally suppressed barrel, curved box magazine, ergonomic grip, and fixed polymer stock.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the ribbed buttplate of the stock and the straight alignment of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: A full right-side profile displays the same features as the left, with clear visibility of the magazine, grip, and stock details.
attribute_stock_design: fixed polymer stock with ribbed buttplate
attribute_iron_sight_configuration: simple rear notch with fixed front post
